_meta.note: The interwoven quest arcs. CavrilWayfarer.buildQuests() turns each node into a Campaign Codex 'quest' journal (game.campaignCodex.createQuestJournal), wires dependencies/unlocks from prereqFlags + the flag setters, and links the quest-giver NPC. Outcomes branch the world-state. Edit the world quest journals after, or edit this + rebuild.

elara.name: Elara
elara.cue: Clutches a small wooden toy, eyes red, speaks in a frantic, exhausted whisper.

lordmoth.name: Lord Moth
lordmoth.cue: Humanoid moth, sips nectar from a glass, speaks with chilling, polite apathy.

grick.name: Grick
grick.cue: Missing an ear, paranoid, constantly checks his pockets.

viconia.name: Viconia
viconia.cue: Cold, calculating, spins a silver coin endlessly over her knuckles.

marla.name: Elder Marla
marla.cue: Leans heavily on a cane, spits when she says 'Loyalist,' fiercely protective.

vane.name: Captain Vane
vane.cue: Polished armor, tired eyes, rigidly follows rules to mask his fear of the coming war.

thrain.name: Thrain
thrain.cue: Covered in soot, coughs violently, holds a massive pickaxe.

otto.name: Ser Otto
otto.cue: Arrogant, wears a fur-lined cape, treats the party like peasants.

ignis.name: Ignis
ignis.cue: Vain, easily flattered, hoards shiny military medals instead of gold.

sinker.name: Sinker
sinker.cue: Missing teeth, smiles too wide, smells of rotting fish and cheap perfume.

sylas.name: Sylas
sylas.cue: Covered in mud, eyes glow with a faint green light, speaks to the trees.

oola.name: Oola
oola.cue: Blind in one eye, stirs a bubbling pot with a human femur.

salt.name: Captain 'Salt'
salt.cue: Wooden leg, impeccable manners, drinks rum from a teacup.

silkfox.name: The Silk Fox
silkfox.cue: Wears a featureless porcelain mask, speaks in a synthesized, magical voice.

kaelen.name: Kaelen
kaelen.cue: Wrapped head-to-toe in linen, communicates mostly in hand signals.

vance.name: Professor Vance
vance.cue: Frantic, bitten by bugs, holding half of a glowing stone tablet.

azir.name: Mummy Lord Azir
azir.cue: Speaks directly into the players' minds, promises eternal life.

nodes.title: The Empty Beds
nodes.situation: Three children vanished from the city slums overnight. The guard blames the rebel factions, but Elara saw a twisted shadow dragging a sack northeast.
nodes.objective: Investigate the slums. Gather 3 Grave-Dust (Gatherer ingredient) to reveal magical tracks leading to the Forest.

outcomes.label: Success
outcomes.reward: 50gp and Elara's Blessing (+1 to all Insight checks in the city).

nodes.title: The Sleeping Forest
nodes.situation: The woods are dead silent; pollen falls like snow. The air forces a CON save (DC 13) or gain 1 Exhaustion.
nodes.objective: Track the coven. Navigate to the Hag's Hut while dealing with corrupted treants.

outcomes.label: Success
outcomes.reward: Discover the Hags are bottling the children's tears for a portal. Harvest 1d4 Dream-Weed and 1 Wand of Magic Missiles from a dead adventurer.

nodes.title: The Tear Market
nodes.situation: The hags sell the bottled sorrow to Lord Moth, who uses it to brew illegal emotion-potions.
nodes.objective: Sabotage the market. Destroy the tear-vials, or trade a powerful memory (permanently lose a proficiency for 1 week) to buy the children's contracts.

outcomes.label: Destroy the Vials
outcomes.reward: Hags lose their power (unlocks the Hag Boss Fight). Lord Moth becomes an enemy.

outcomes.label: Buy the Contracts
outcomes.reward: The children are freed. Gain a Cloak of Displacement.

nodes.title: The Crying Echoes
nodes.situation: If the party fails to track the Hags, the kids are moved underground. The Hags use the cave systems to transport children to the Underdark.
nodes.objective: Intercept the caravan before they reach the deep dark.

outcomes.label: Success
outcomes.reward: Rescue the kids. Gain 3 Luminous Spores (Gatherer).

outcomes.label: Failure
outcomes.reward: The kids are sold into the deep dark.

nodes.title: The Drow Broker
nodes.situation: Viconia brokers the stolen children to the slaver rings of the deep.
nodes.objective: Infiltrate the Drow outpost. Stealth or assault to free the kids from the spider-silk pens.

outcomes.label: Success
outcomes.reward: Spider Climb spell scroll, 500gp, and the Blessing of the Deep (Darkvision 60ft for 3 days).

nodes.title: The Scorched Granary
nodes.situation: Loyalist troops are marching through, demanding the winter harvest.
nodes.objective: Fortify the village against the requisition squad, or force Marla to surrender the food.

outcomes.label: Defend
outcomes.reward: The village holds its harvest.

nodes.title: The Iron Toll
nodes.situation: The road is locked down. Starving rebels plan to ambush a critical supply wagon.
nodes.objective: Escort the wagon, or let the rebels take it.

outcomes.label: Escort
outcomes.reward: The supply line holds.

outcomes.label: Sabotage
outcomes.reward: The rebels take the wagon.

nodes.title: The Iron Mine Strike
nodes.situation: Rebels have seized the Loyalist iron mines. The military is threatening to collapse the tunnels with everyone inside.
nodes.objective: Sneak through the Hills to defuse the blasting powder, or detonate it yourself.

outcomes.label: Defuse
outcomes.reward: Save the miners. Gain a Mithril Chain Shirt.

outcomes.label: Detonate
outcomes.reward: Mine destroyed, Loyalist army crippled. Harvest 1d4 Fire-Salts.

nodes.title: The Avalanche Pass
nodes.situation: The main mountain pass is blocked by an unnatural avalanche caused by Frost Giant mercenaries hired by the rival nation.
nodes.objective: Clear the pass and slay the Giant leader.

outcomes.label: Success
outcomes.reward: Belt of Dwarvenkind. Harvest 1 Giant's Marrow (potent strength potions).

nodes.title: The Dragon's Draft
nodes.situation: The Loyalists want to recruit a dragon for the impending war.
nodes.objective: Deliver 2,000gp of tribute to the peak. Give it to the Dragon, or steal the hoard and flee.

outcomes.label: Recruit the Dragon
outcomes.reward: If recruited, random encounters in Grasslands are replaced by Dragon strafing runs.

outcomes.label: Steal the Hoard
outcomes.reward: Flee with the dragon's medals + tribute.

nodes.title: The Rotting Arms Deal
nodes.situation: A weapons cache is guarded by a Black Dragon Wyrmling in the deep marsh.
nodes.objective: Slay or drive off the Wyrmling.

outcomes.label: Success
outcomes.reward: 500gp, Weapon of Warning, Harvest 2 Black Dragon Scales.

nodes.title: The Bleeding Source
nodes.situation: Sylas is poisoning the military's river supply with necrotic sap.
nodes.objective: Kill Sylas, or help him destroy the Loyalist dam.

outcomes.label: Kill Sylas
outcomes.reward: The river runs clean again.

outcomes.label: Destroy the Dam
outcomes.reward: Staff of the Adder. Harvest 3 Blood-Root.

nodes.title: The Sunken Emissary
nodes.situation: An assassinated ambassador's carriage is at the bottom of the lake.
nodes.objective: Dive in, survive the Chuul, retrieve the Signet Ring.

outcomes.label: Give to the Rebels
outcomes.reward: The ring buys peace.

outcomes.label: Give to the Loyalists
outcomes.reward: The ring fuels the war.

nodes.title: The Blockade Runners
nodes.situation: The weapons need to be shipped to the capital, but the coast is blockaded by naval ships.
nodes.objective: Man the cannons on a smuggling sloop to break the blockade.

outcomes.label: Success
outcomes.reward: Ring of Swimming.

nodes.title: The Syndicate's Favor
nodes.situation: The weapons arrived. The Syndicate asks you to assassinate the Loyalist Mayor to spark the revolution.

outcomes.label: Success
outcomes.reward: Assassin's Blood poison (Gatherer crafted), 2,000gp.

nodes.title: The Glass Sands
nodes.situation: A magical plague is turning the desert sand into jagged glass, shredding caravans.
nodes.objective: Escort Kaelen to the center of the anomaly.

outcomes.label: Success
outcomes.reward: Discover a malfunctioning ancient obelisk. Harvest 1d6 Glass-Flowers.

nodes.title: The Overgrown Ziggurat
nodes.situation: The obelisk's control mechanism is in a lost jungle city across the map.

outcomes.label: Success
outcomes.reward: Pearl of Power. Harvest 2 Serpent-Venom Glands.

nodes.title: The Plague Lord
nodes.situation: Mummy Lord Azir offers eternal life in exchange for the tablet.
nodes.objective: Return to the Desert with the tablet to seal the tomb, or accept Azir's dark blessing.

outcomes.label: Seal the Tomb
outcomes.reward: Desert DC returns to normal. Gain a Sun Blade.

outcomes.label: Accept the Blessing
outcomes.reward: Immunity to Disease, but Vulnerability to Radiant damage.
